overall.description: First-person cockpit view from a space simulation game, showing steady flight through deep space toward a bright celestial object. The scene features detailed holographic HUD displays and a curved planetary surface visible below the spacecraft.

segments.scene_description: The spacecraft maintains a steady course through deep space, with the cockpit view dominated by a bright star ahead and the curved horizon of a planet below. The holographic HUD displays remain static, showing no targets, while the vessel cruises through the starfield with nebula clouds visible in the peripheral background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a steady first-person trajectory through deep space, maintaining a constant course toward a distant celestial light. It begins with the cockpit view centered on a bright star ahead, while the curved horizon of a planet stretches across the lower frame. As the vessel cruises forward, the static holographic HUD displays remain fixed against a backdrop of shimmering starfields. The scene then expands to reveal swirling nebula clouds drifting through the peripheral background before the spacecraft continues its unwavering flight toward the glowing destination.
